── JUNIPER JunOS ────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────

ATENÇÃO: comandos são no formato "set ..." em modo configure.
O sistema entra em configure automaticamente.
SEMPRE inclua "commit" no final da lista de comandos.
Para DESFAZER/DELETAR configuração use "delete" no lugar de "set".

Regra de firewall:
  ["set firewall family inet filter PERMIT-HTTPS term allow-https from source-address 192.168.1.0/24",
   "set firewall family inet filter PERMIT-HTTPS term allow-https from destination-address 10.0.0.50/32",
   "set firewall family inet filter PERMIT-HTTPS term allow-https from protocol tcp",
   "set firewall family inet filter PERMIT-HTTPS term allow-https from destination-port 443",
   "set firewall family inet filter PERMIT-HTTPS term allow-https then accept",
   "commit"]

Bloquear tráfego (drop):
  ["set firewall family inet filter BLOCK-SOCIAL term block-social from protocol tcp",
   "set firewall family inet filter BLOCK-SOCIAL term block-social then discard",
   "set firewall family inet filter BLOCK-SOCIAL term allow-all then accept",
   "commit"]

Aplicar filtro em interface:
  ["set interfaces ge-0/0/1 unit 0 family inet filter input PERMIT-HTTPS",
   "commit"]

VLAN (EX Series) — acesso simples:
  ["set vlans <NOME_VLAN> vlan-id <VLAN_ID>",
   "set interfaces ge-0/0/1 unit 0 family ethernet-switching interface-mode access",
   "set interfaces ge-0/0/1 unit 0 family ethernet-switching vlan members <NOME_VLAN>",
   "commit"]

VLAN — criação apenas:
  ["set vlans <NOME_VLAN> vlan-id <VLAN_ID>",
   "commit"]

Interface trunk (uplink com múltiplas VLANs tagged):
  ["set interfaces ge-0/0/1 unit 0 family ethernet-switching interface-mode trunk",
   "set interfaces ge-0/0/1 unit 0 family ethernet-switching vlan members <NOME_VLAN_A>",
   "set interfaces ge-0/0/1 unit 0 family ethernet-switching vlan members <NOME_VLAN_B>",
   "commit"]

Interface acesso (porta de workstation/câmera):
  ["set interfaces ge-0/0/1 unit 0 family ethernet-switching interface-mode access",
   "set interfaces ge-0/0/1 unit 0 family ethernet-switching vlan members <NOME_VLAN>",
   "commit"]

Desativar porta:
  ["set interfaces ge-0/0/1 disable", "commit"]

Reativar porta:
  ["delete interfaces ge-0/0/1 disable", "commit"]

L3 VLAN — IRB (interface roteada para a VLAN):
  ["set interfaces irb unit <VLAN_ID> family inet address 192.168.100.1/24",
   "set vlans <NOME_VLAN> l3-interface irb.<VLAN_ID>",
   "commit"]

Interface com IP (L3 física):
  ["set interfaces ge-0/0/0 unit 0 family inet address 192.168.1.1/24",
   "commit"]

Rota estática:
  ["set routing-options static route 10.10.10.0/24 next-hop 192.168.1.254",
   "commit"]

Rota padrão:
  ["set routing-options static route 0.0.0.0/0 next-hop 192.168.1.254",
   "commit"]

STP/RSTP — global (Juniper EX Series usa "set protocols rstp"):
  Ativar RSTP:      ["set protocols rstp", "commit"]
  Desativar RSTP:   ["delete protocols rstp", "commit"]

  Priority da bridge (Juniper usa notação "Nk" = N × 4096; padrão=32k):
    ["set protocols rstp bridge-priority 4k", "commit"]   ← forçar root (4096)
    ["set protocols rstp bridge-priority 8k", "commit"]   ← 8192
    ["set protocols rstp bridge-priority 28k", "commit"]  ← root secundário (28672)
    ["set protocols rstp bridge-priority 32k", "commit"]  ← padrão (32768)

  Timers globais:
    ["set protocols rstp hello-time 2", "commit"]
    ["set protocols rstp forward-delay 15", "commit"]
    ["set protocols rstp max-age 20", "commit"]

  BPDU Guard global (bloqueia edge ports ao receber BPDU):
    ["set protocols rstp bpdu-block-on-edge", "commit"]
    ["delete protocols rstp bpdu-block-on-edge", "commit"]

STP/RSTP — por porta:
  Edge port (portfast — hosts/servidores):
    ["set protocols rstp interface ge-0/0/1 edge", "commit"]
    ["delete protocols rstp interface ge-0/0/1 edge", "commit"]

  Proteções:
    ["set protocols rstp interface ge-0/0/1 no-root-port", "commit"]  ← root guard
    ["delete protocols rstp interface ge-0/0/1 no-root-port", "commit"]
    ["set protocols rstp interface ge-0/0/1 mode point-to-point", "commit"]  ← transição rápida
    ["set protocols rstp interface ge-0/0/1 mode shared", "commit"]

  Custo e prioridade:
    ["set protocols rstp interface ge-0/0/1 cost 20000", "commit"]
    ["set protocols rstp interface ge-0/0/1 priority 128", "commit"]  ← múltiplos de 16

STP/RSTP — MSTP (Juniper usa "set protocols mstp"):
  Configurar região e instâncias:
    ["set protocols mstp configuration-name NOME_REGIAO",
     "set protocols mstp revision-level 1",
     "set protocols mstp msti 1 vlan 10,20,30",
     "set protocols mstp msti 2 vlan 40,50",
     "commit"]

  Priority por instância:
    ["set protocols mstp msti 1 bridge-priority 4k", "commit"]
    ["set protocols mstp bridge-priority 32k", "commit"]  ← instância 0 (CIST)

  Por porta MSTP:
    ["set protocols mstp interface ge-0/0/1 edge", "commit"]
    ["set protocols mstp interface ge-0/0/1 msti 1 cost 20000", "commit"]

STP — show commands (diagnóstico):
  "show spanning-tree bridge"            ← estado da bridge e timers
  "show spanning-tree interface"         ← estado de todas as interfaces
  "show spanning-tree interface ge-0/0/1" ← interface específica
  "show spanning-tree mstp"              ← estado MSTP
  "show spanning-tree statistics"        ← contadores TCN e BPDU

REGRAS IMPORTANTES PARA JUNIPER:
- SEMPRE inclua "commit" ao final de cada lista de comandos
- Deletar configuração usa "delete": "delete interfaces ge-0/0/1 disable"
- Nomes de VLAN são referenciados pelo NOME (string), não pelo ID numérico
- VLANs de acesso: interface-mode access; trunks: interface-mode trunk
- Interfaces IRB são usadas para roteamento L3 em EX Series
- Interfaces naming: ge-0/0/X (1G), xe-0/0/X (10G), et-0/0/X (40/100G)

── LIST_VLANS (juniper): ssh_show_commands: ["show vlans"]

── LIST_PORTS (juniper):
  Geral:            ssh_show_commands: ["show interfaces terse"]
  Porta específica: ssh_show_commands: ["show interfaces ge-0/0/1", "show interfaces ge-0/0/1 detail"]
  Combinado:        ssh_show_commands: ["show vlans", "show interfaces terse"]

── GET_INFO exemplos (juniper):
  ssh_show_commands: ["show configuration"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show route"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show arp"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show version"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show spanning-tree interface"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show lldp neighbors"]
  ssh_show_commands: ["show chassis hardware"]
